form.formComment: Returns from a 40-day let-up. Last start won by 1.5 len at this track March 2 over 1600m in soft going defeating Mighty Ever carrying 55.5kg at $4.90. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at this track on January 4 over 1800m, on a slow track; 13 len behind No Problem with 57kg at $4.40. Chances enhanced by drawing a nice marble.

Can bounce back after a modest effort last time.
